weekly picks (Mar 3 week 2026)

Posted on March 16, 2026 in 2026mar,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 3rd week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

03/20

  1. s41467-026-70833-1 Plasmonic Dirac-vortex lasers via three-dimensional photonic mass vortices engineering (Nature Communications)
